description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and landscaping. The main structure features a gable roof with dark shingles and a prominent chimney, while the exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or siding. The property includes a driveway leading to a detached garage, a backyard with a swimming pool, and several mature trees and shrubs providing shade and privacy. The front yard is bordered by a sidewalk and a paved road, with ornamental bushes and flower beds enhancing curb appeal. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the front facade, and a small covered porch is visible at the main entrance. The overall setting suggests a suburban residential neighborhood with ample outdoor space and amenities.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, set in a suburban neighborhood. The house features a light exterior, symmetrical windows, and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, landscaped front yard, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, backyard pool, and mature trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, and the back facade of the bungalow with additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, privacy fencing, and the side of the house with visible windows and landscaping.
